description:
Browser where your favorite apps won't get buried in tabs.


🍪 Biscuit Release Note

⚡️New features
- Added Copy as Markdown actions to both the Edit menu and webview selections for easier reuse of links and text.

💪🏻Improvements
- Improved notification badge detection for more reliable unread indicators.
- Simplified the settings dialog by removing redundant section summaries for a cleaner layout.

🐞Bug
- Restored the webview management flow to a more stable state by reverting the recent memory optimization changes.
